description:
Fix URL inconsistency in CLI output: the display lines say http://localhost:9515/mcp but the MCP client config JSON says http://127.0.0.1:9515/mcp. Standardize on 127.0.0.1 everywhere (more reliable, avoids IPv6 resolution issues). Also update README.md config example to match CLI output.

LOW issues found during UX testing (not fixed in this PRD):
- config set port 8080 says 'Restart the MCP server' but doesn't say HOW (Ctrl+C and re-run opentabs start)
- plugin list when server offline says 'No plugins installed' — misleading, should say server not running
- config show displays explicit 'enabled' entries for browser tools after disable/re-enable cycle (already fixed in source, pending publish via version bump)

userStories.title: Standardize CLI display URLs to 127.0.0.1 and update README config
userStories.description: As a new user, I want the opentabs start display output and README config example to use 127.0.0.1 consistently so that I don't see conflicting URLs for the same service.
acceptanceCriteria: opentabs start display lines (MCP endpoint, Health check) use http://127.0.0.1:<port> instead of http://localhost:<port>
README.md Claude Code config example uses http://127.0.0.1:9515/mcp
userStories.notes:
Two files to change:

1. platform/cli/src/commands/start.ts — Lines 282-283: Change `http://localhost:${port}/mcp` to `http://127.0.0.1:${port}/mcp` and `http://localhost:${port}/health` to `http://127.0.0.1:${port}/health`. These are the display lines shown during startup.

2. README.md — Line 74-75: Change `"url": "http://localhost:9515/mcp"` to `"url": "http://127.0.0.1:9515/mcp"` in the Claude Code config JSON example.

Do NOT change the actual server listen address or the MCP client config generation (those already use 127.0.0.1). Only change the two display console.log lines in start.ts and the README example.
